title: Cobblemon Quick Item Swap
description: Add quick held item switching function to Cobblemon's PC
body:
# Cobblemon Quick Item Swap

This mod adds faster held item management directly inside Cobblemon's PC screen.

## How to Use

1. Open a Cobblemon PC.
2. Click the inventory button added to the PC interface.
3. Pick up an item from your inventory panel.
4. Right-click a Pokémon in the PC or party area to swap its held item.
5. Close the PC normally when finished.

![Short GIF about quick inserting held item for Cobblemon PC](https://media4.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExeG8wMGR0YnJrZGp6ZnRjMWY3eG03Ync3YzUxYTl6a3hqdjI2d2JqMiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/IROmr809EEAvihTlbw/giphy.gif)

## Dependencies
Only Cobblemon

## Bugs???
Please report them in the github issue page
